brand.name: TRGVC
brand.tagline: Music Producer • PC Gamer • Digital Creator
brand.description: TRGVC is a UK-based electronic music producer, gaming creator, and digital media brand blending cinematic atmosphere, Warzone energy, Forza speed, and community-driven content.

albums.title: Signals in the Dark
albums.note: Dark neon atmosphere, club-ready drive, and cinematic pressure.

albums.title: Pulse of the Night
albums.note: Night-drive energy with glowing synths, and emotional hooks.

albums.title: Velocity Horizon
albums.note: Fast, futuristic, and built for racing edits and high-intensity moments.

albums.title: The Digital Sunrise
albums.note: Bright melodic energy built around optimism, progress, and digital rebirth.

singles.title: Forward
singles.note: Life is not easy, but the mission is to look ahead and leave the past behind.

singles.title: Light It Up
singles.note: Club-ready positive energy with male and female duet moments.

singles.title: Silent Blueprint
singles.note: Protect the mission, trust your pace, and move without needing validation.

news.title: TRGVC Website v2 launches
news.body: A new cinematic home for music, gaming, videos, wallpapers, releases, and community links.

news.title: Forward artwork direction
news.body: TRGVC continues building a neon cinematic visual language around motivation, and brighter horizons.

news.title: Warzone Avalon final-circle content
news.body: New short-form concepts focus on comeback wins, gulag returns, and intense final-circle moments.

notes: Update this file when release links, socials, videos, or news posts change. Static HTML pages are ready now; this JSON is included for future automation.
